HEADER
RohanKumar
123 SeelDehil, 110085|*919909999999|rk@gmaiLcom| https:/hwww.inkodin.comin/rohan-kumar|https:igihuh.com/Rohankumar
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Objective/ProfileSummary
Seeking a chalienging opportunity in the fieid of Data Scienoe Have good inowlierige of ensecuting data driven projodts using predictive models. Pruficient in numerous statistical, machine leaming and doep Pyton,EA8elc
EDUCATION
MA Statisties, University-of Delhi, 2019, 1° Division
BA Sustisics, University of Delhi, 2017, 1 Division
High Sdhodl,DPS,Commeroe,2014,95%
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Experience
July2019-December2019
Inbern|Department af Data Analysis|Hewlett-Packard|Delh
Used predfictive analyais such as machine leaming and data mining techniques to forecas! company sales of new products with 95% aocuracy.
Develop ETS for data souroes used forreporting by sales,imventory,and marketing departments.
Certification
Duta 5clence using SA5 and R from Analytix Labs (lan 2o19 - Apnil 2019]
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Proficient in SAS, R Programming and Advanced MS Exoel. Leveraging SAS and R statistical tools for data managnment, explaratory analyss and data visuallzation. Business Analytical Techniques -Segmentation (RFM, K-means dusteringl, Regression anahss Cassification, Dedision Trees and Time Series Forecasting.
Advance Big Data Sdence from AnalytiiLabs(Nowember 2ois-Aprll 2o18)
Leamt data arahsis with python, Acance Statistios, Machine learming algorithms, Span SQj. B BataFrame and MLlib
Performed Fraud Ad Click Oetection where developed a solution to differentiate a fraud cid from the genuine dicks and provided a method to remove thcse fraudulent didks

## HEADER

RohanKumar
123 SeelDehil, 110085|*919909999999|rk@gmaiLcom| https:/hwww.inkodin.comin/rohan-kumar|https:igihuh.com/Rohankumar

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Objective/ProfileSummary
Seeking a chalienging opportunity in the fieid of Data Scienoe Have good inowlierige of ensecuting data driven projodts using predictive models. Pruficient in numerous statistical, machine leaming and doep Pyton,EA8elc

## EDUCATION

### MA Statisties, University-of Delhi, 2019, 1° Division
### BA Sustisics, University of Delhi, 2017, 1 Division
### High Sdhodl,DPS,Commeroe,2014,95%

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Experience
July2019-December2019
### Inbern|Department af Data Analysis|Hewlett-Packard|Delh
- Used predfictive analyais such as machine leaming and data mining techniques to forecas! company sales of new products with 95% aocuracy.
### Develop ETS for data souroes used forreporting by sales,imventory,and marketing departments.
- Certification
- Duta 5clence using SA5 and R from Analytix Labs (lan 2o19 - Apnil 2019]

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

Proficient in SAS, R Programming and Advanced MS Exoel. Leveraging SAS and R statistical tools for data managnment, explaratory analyss and data visuallzation. Business Analytical Techniques -Segmentation (RFM, K-means dusteringl, Regression anahss Cassification, Dedision Trees and Time Series Forecasting.
Advance Big Data Sdence from AnalytiiLabs(Nowember 2ois-Aprll 2o18)
Leamt data arahsis with python, Acance Statistios, Machine learming algorithms, Span SQj. B BataFrame and MLlib
Performed Fraud Ad Click Oetection where developed a solution to differentiate a fraud cid from the genuine dicks and provided a method to remove thcse fraudulent didks
